dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your verification projects and recent activity

welcome.title: Welcome to AIRAS
welcome.description: AIRAS is an AI-powered research automation platform for researchers. From hypothesis formulation to experiment execution and paper writing, AI supports your entire research process.

workflow.title: Verification Workflow
workflow.description: We support you from verification planning to experiment execution and paper writing. You can proceed step by step through each phase.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Research
autonomous.description: An autonomous research mode is also available where AI automatically conducts research. There are two modes: Topic-Driven and Hypothesis-Driven.
autonomous.topicDrivenDesc: AI generates hypotheses from your topic
autonomous.hypothesisDrivenDesc: AI runs experiments based on your hypothesis

home.title: Verifications
home.noVerificationsDesc: Create your first verification using the New Verification button

chatInput.title: What would you like to verify?
chatInput.subtitle: Enter the hypothesis or research topic you want to verify. AI will propose and execute a verification plan.
chatInput.placeholder: e.g., Does Sparse Attention improve inference speed? What is the effect on accuracy?

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: How to use AIRAS and its features

links.discordDesc: Ask questions and discuss with the community

step1.title: 1. Create a Verification
step1.description: Click the "New Verification" button in the sidebar. Enter your hypothesis or research topic and AI will search for related papers and propose a verification plan.

step2.title: 2. Select a Verification Plan
step2.description: AI will present multiple verification plans. Compare the pros and cons of each plan and select the most appropriate one.

step3.title: 3. Run the Experiment
step3.description: Experiment code is generated based on your selected plan. Configure the parameters, run the experiment, and review the results.

step4.title: 4. Write the Paper
step4.description: AI generates a paper draft based on the experiment results. You can also continue editing using Overleaf integration.

verificationWorkflow.title: Verification Workflow
verificationWorkflow.a1: Verification proceeds in the order: Verification Plan → Method → Experiment Code → Experiment Setup → Results → Information Gathering → Paper. Each phase can be viewed by category on the verification list page.
verificationWorkflow.q2: Can I resume a verification midway?
verificationWorkflow.a2: Yes, selecting a verification from the verification list page allows you to resume from where you left off. The results of each phase are automatically saved.

autonomousResearch.title: Autonomous Research (Topic-Driven / Hypothesis-Driven)
autonomousResearch.a1: Topic-Driven takes a research topic as input and AI automatically handles everything from hypothesis generation to paper writing. Hypothesis-Driven is for when you already have a hypothesis to verify, and AI performs experiments and paper writing based on that hypothesis.
autonomousResearch.a2: Yes, a GitHub repository is required for experiment code management, and Weights & Biases is needed for logging experiment metrics. Please prepare accounts for each service in advance.

integration.title: Integration Settings
integration.a1: You can configure API keys for each service from the Settings > Integration page. LLM API keys for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc., and a GitHub Personal Access Token are required.
integration.a2: In the autonomous research advanced settings, you can individually specify the LLM model used for each process (paper search, hypothesis generation, code generation, etc.).

paper.title: Paper-related
paper.a1: Currently, MDPI, ICLR 2024, and Agents4Science 2025 templates are supported. You can select from the advanced settings.
paper.q2: How to edit the generated paper
paper.a2: Papers are saved in a GitHub repository. You can view them via a PDF link, and also edit them directly in Overleaf using the "Edit on Overleaf" button.

faqItems.a1: Basic features are available for free. There are limits on the number of monthly verifications and AI model selection, but you can upgrade to a paid plan to remove these limits.
faqItems.a2: All data is transmitted via encrypted communication and stored in a secure cloud infrastructure. Users' research data is never shared with other users.
faqItems.q3: What should I do if I find a bug or issue?
faqItems.a3: Please send a bug report from the "Contact" page in the sidebar, or report it on the GitHub Issues page.

feedback.title: Contact
feedback.subtitle: Send us your feedback or bug reports
feedback.successDescription: We will review your feedback and contact you if needed.
feedback.subject: Subject
feedback.emailHelpText: Enter your email if you need a reply

faqItems.q1: Who owns the copyright of research output generated by AIRAS?
faqItems.a1: The copyright of research output generated through AIRAS belongs to the user in principle. However, legal treatment of AI-generated content varies by country, so please refer to the Terms of Use for details.
faqItems.q2: What is the difference between the free and paid plans?
faqItems.a2: The free plan has limits on the number of monthly verifications and available AI models. The paid plan includes unlimited verifications, access to high-performance AI models, priority support, and other additional features.
faqItems.a3: All data is transmitted via encrypted communication and stored in a secure cloud infrastructure. We conduct regular security audits and follow industry-standard security practices.

legal.title: Terms of Use
legal.subtitle: Please read before using AIRAS
legal.pageSubtitle: Terms and policies for using our service

overview.title: Service Overview
overview.content: AIRAS is an AI-powered research support platform. This service provides hypothesis generation, verification planning, automatic experiment code generation, and paper writing support. These terms define the conditions applicable to your use of the service.

usage.title: Terms of Use
usage.content: To use this service, you must be 18 years of age or older, or have obtained the consent of a legal guardian. Users shall use this service only for academic research and legitimate purposes. We may suspend accounts if unauthorized use is confirmed.

account.title: Account
account.content: Users must create an account by providing accurate and up-to-date information. Please keep your account credentials secure and do not share them with third parties. Users are responsible for all activities on their account.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: Intellectual property rights in content generated through this service are handled in accordance with applicable law. Rights to data entered by users and research output belong to the user in principle. However, anonymized data may be used to improve the service.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This service is provided "as is" and we do not guarantee the accuracy of AI-generated results. Final verification of research output is the responsibility of the user. We are not responsible for any damage caused by service interruption or termination.

law.title: Governing Law
law.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Japan. Any disputes related to these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court as the court of first instance.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information such as your name, email address, and institutional affiliation when you create an account. We also automatically collect log data related to service usage (access date and time, features used, error information, etc.). For research data, we only handle data explicitly uploaded by users.

usage.title: How We Use Information
usage.content: We use the information collected for providing, operating, and improving the service, providing user support, and maintaining security. Anonymized data may be used to improve AI model accuracy and for research purposes. We will not use personal information for marketing purposes without user consent.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not share users' personal information with third parties except when required by law. We may entrust data processing to trusted partner companies to the extent necessary to provide the service. In such cases, appropriate contracts and security measures are implemented.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.content: User data is stored on servers with appropriate security measures. The data retention period is while the account is active and for the period required by law thereafter. If you request account deletion, we will delete your data within a reasonable period.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions or requests regarding the privacy policy, please contact us via the contact form on the support page. We also handle requests for data disclosure, correction, deletion, etc.
